data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a final settlement audit trail.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of a final settlement audit trail, which is explicitly listed as a need in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or confirmations regarding the existence or handling of such an audit trail, leading to an inconclusive status. The lack of specific evidence related to this requirement means that it cannot be determined whether it is satisfied or not.
gaps: No evidence of final settlement audit trail.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the existence of a final settlement audit trail.
